docs.title: Atlassian Agent - A2A | AG-UI | MCP
docs.text: Version: 0.7.0

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Atlassian Agent MCP Server + A2A Agent

Comprehensive AI agent for Jira and Confluence management.

This repository is actively maintained - Contributions are welcome!

docs.title: Using as an MCP Server
docs.text: The MCP Server can be run in two modes: stdio (for local testing) or http (for networked access).

docs.title: Environment Variables
docs.text:
Shared Cloud Variables: * ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL: The URL of the target service (e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net). * ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN: The API token or access token for Cloud.

Jira Server Variables: * ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_URL: The URL of the Jira Server. * ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_USER: The username for Jira Server. * ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_TOKEN: The token/password for Jira Server. * ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_VERIFY: Boolean to verify SSL for Jira Server.

Confluence Server Variables: * ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_URL: The URL of the Confluence Server. * ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_USER: The username for Confluence Server. * ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_TOKEN: The token/password for Confluence Server. * ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_VERIFY: Boolean to verify SSL for Confluence Server.

docs.title: Run in stdio mode (default):
docs.text:
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL="http://localhost:8080"
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN="your_token"
atlassian-mcp --transport "stdio"

docs.title: Run in HTTP mode:
docs.text:
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL="http://localhost:8080"
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN="your_token"
atlassian-mcp --transport "http" --host "0.0.0.0" --port "8000"

docs.title: Run A2A Server
docs.text:
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL="http://localhost:8080"
export ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN="your_token"
atlassian-agent --provider openai --model-id gpt-4o --api-key sk-...

docs.title: Build
docs.text: docker build -t atlassian-agent .

docs.title: Run MCP Server
docs.text:
docker run -d \
  --name atlassian-agent \
  -p 8000:8000 \
  -e TRANSPORT=http \
  -e ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL="http://your-service:8080" \
  -e ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN="your_token" \
  knucklessg1/atlassian-agent:latest

docs.title: Deploy with Docker Compose
docs.text:
services:
  atlassian-agent:
    image: knucklessg1/atlassian-agent:latest
    environment:
      - HOST=0.0.0.0
      - PORT=8000
      - TRANSPORT=http
      - ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL=http://your-service:8080
      - ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN=your_token
    ports:
      - 8000:8000

docs.title: Configure mcp.json for AI Integration (e.g. Claude Desktop)
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "atlassian": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "--with",
        "atlassian-agent",
        "atlassian-mcp"
      ],
      "env": {
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL": "http://your-service:8080",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN": "your_token",
        "ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_URL": "http://your-jira-server",
        "ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_USER": "your-username",
        "ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_TOKEN": "your-jira-token",
        "ATLASSIAN_JIRA_SERVER_VERIFY": "true",
        "ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_URL": "http://your-confluence-server",
        "ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_USER": "your-username",
        "ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_TOKEN": "your-confluence-token",
        "ATLASSIAN_CONFLUENCE_SERVER_VERIFY": "true"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: Install Python Package
docs.text:
python -m pip install atlassian-agent

uv pip install atlassian-agent

docs.title: 1. Standard IO (stdio) Deployment
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "atlassian-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "atlassian-mcp"
      ],
      "env": {
        "AGENT_DESCRIPTION": "<YOUR_AGENT_DESCRIPTION>",
        "AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT": "<YOUR_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_USER": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_USER>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_VERIFY": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_VERIFY>",
        "DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME": "<YOUR_DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME>"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: 2. Streamable HTTP (SSE) Deployment
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "atlassian-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "atlassian-mcp",
        "--transport",
        "http",
        "--host",
        "0.0.0.0",
        "--port",
        "8000"
      ],
      "env": {
        "AGENT_DESCRIPTION": "<YOUR_AGENT_DESCRIPTION>",
        "AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT": "<YOUR_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_TOKEN>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_URL>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_USER": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_USER>",
        "ATLASSIAN_AGENT_VERIFY": "<YOUR_ATLASSIAN_AGENT_VERIFY>",
        "DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME": "<YOUR_DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME>"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: atlassian-agent — Concept Overview
docs.text: Category: Productivity | Ecosystem Role: MCP Server + A2A Agent Built on agent-utilities — the unified AGI Harness.

docs.title: Description
docs.text: Comprehensive AI agent for Jira and Confluence management.

docs.title: Enterprise Readiness
docs.text:
All agents in the ecosystem inherit enterprise-grade infrastructure from agent-utilities:

Feature Status Source JWT/OIDC Authentication ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[auth] — Authlib JWKS + API key middleware OpenTelemetry Instrumentation ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[logfire] — OTLP export, FastAPI auto-instrumentation HashiCorp Vault Integration ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[vault] — secret://, env://, vault:// URI schemes Audit Logging ✅ Built-in Append-only compliance trail with 30+ action types (CONCEPT:OS-5.7) Token Usage Analytics ✅ Built-in 4-bucket tracking with budget alerting (CONCEPT:OS-5.6) Prompt Injection Defense ✅ Built-in 25+ pattern scanner + jailbreak taxonomy (CONCEPT:OS-5.4, OS-5.12) Guardrail Engine ✅ Built-in Input/output interception with block/redact/warn (CONCEPT:OS-5.8) Execution Budget Controls ✅ Built-in Token, cost, duration, and node transition limits (CONCEPT:ORCH-1.3) Multi-Model Routing ✅ Built-in Tier-based + confidence-gated adaptive selection (CONCEPT:ORCH-1.2) Session Concurrency ✅ Built-in Enqueue/reject/interrupt/rollback (CONCEPT:OS-5.3)

docs.title: Concept Registry
docs.text:
This project implements or inherits the following ecosystem concepts:

Concept ID Description Source ECO-4.1 MCP & Universal Skills agent-utilities (inherited)

📖 Full Registry: See agent-utilities/docs/overview.md for the complete 5-Pillar concept index.

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
This project follows the standardized agent-package pattern:

atlassian-agent/
├── atlassian_agent/        # Source code
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── agent_server.py      # Entry point (create_graph_agent_server)
│   ├── api_client.py        # REST/GraphQL API wrapper
│   └── mcp_server.py        # FastMCP tool definitions
├── tests/                   # Test suite
├── docs/                    # Documentation
├── pyproject.toml           # Package metadata
├── mcp_config.json          # MCP server configuration
├── main_agent.json          # Agent identity & system prompt
└── Dockerfile               # Container deployment

docs.title: stdio Mode
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "atlassian-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": ["run", "--with", "atlassian-agent", "atlassian-mcp"],
      "env": {}
    }
  }
}

docs.title: Streamable HTTP Mode
docs.text: atlassian-mcp --transport streamable-http --port 8001
